column2: bool Interior;  // If the area lacks a directional shadow light e.g. the sun or moon

column1: -float3 ApplyFogAndClampColor(float3 srcColor, float4 fogParam, float3 clampColor, out float3 preClampColor)

column2: preClampColor = (srcColor - lerp(srcColor, fogParam.xyz, fogParam.w) * FogColor.w) * FrameParams.y;
